explanations.12: This checks if the user has scrolled down more than 300 pixels from the top, and updates the isVisible state accordingly.
explanations.13: The passive option tells the browser this scroll listener won't call preventDefault, so it can optimize performance.
explanations.21: After the smooth scroll animation finishes (800 milliseconds), the fly animation state is turned off so the button returns to normal.
explanations.27: clsx is a utility that conditionally combines CSS class names together based on whether conditions are true or false.
